creator: sec@42.org
text:
This is an update of the couchdb port from 0.9 to 0.10.1

This also fixes a small but in the start/stop script.
("-gt" instead of ">")

The automake mess incorrectly tries to strip a shell script.
I don't know how to fix this in src/couchdb/priv/Makefile.am, 
so I set "STRIP=" in the ports Makefile.
